title: Koniag Mourns the Loss of Long-Time Director Conrad Peterson
summary: The streets of heaven have a new angel this morning. Our friend and colleague, Koniag Board Member Conrad Peterson, passed away yesterday of a sudden heart attack. If you measure a person by commitment to their family, people and community, Conrad was a giant. Please keep his wife Amy, his children...
